headline: Bessent: Tiny Pain 😩💸 for Iran Nuke SLAY 🔪🛡️
text:
US Treasury Daddy Scott Bessent 💼🤑 spilling BBC tea ☕📺: 'Lil bit of economic PAIN 😰💦 worth SMASHING Iran's nuke THREAT 💣☢️ to London vibes 🏰🇬🇧!' IMF simps 🤡📉 WARNING global RECESSION 🚨📉 from US-Israel Iran WAR 🔥🇺🇸🇮🇱 vs Mullah Cucks 🕌😭, but Bessent like 'WHO CARES about short-term GDP DIPS 📉😤 when Tehran could NUKE Big Ben 🕰️💥?!' Iran was 60% uranium HORNY 🛢️🔥 pre-war, NO BOMBS YET but shooting at Diego Garcia 🏝️🚀 with mid-range ICBM DICKS 🍆💨 that could HIT London like a bad kebab! UK gov simping 'No missile aim at Europe 👀🚫' but Bessent DROPS truth bomb 💣: 'Biggest risk is the UNKNOWN 😱 – we NEUTERED tail risk of Persian NUKE STRIKES 🐱⚔️!' Strait of Hormuz SHUT 🔒🚢 six weeks in, oil at $120 BARREL BOMB 🚀🛢️ (now $95 chill 🥶), energy PRICES SOARING like Elon rockets 🐦🚀!

IMF Chef Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas 🍳📊 freaking: Prolonged beef = INFLATION ORGY 💥📈 6%, unemployment SPIKE 😩🤑, food insecurity famine vibes 🌾🍞😢 – worse than 70s Arab oil EMBARGO 🚫🛢️ when OPEC cucked US-Israel! But world less oil-addicted 📉🛢️, impact milder than COVID crash 💀🦠. Worst case? Oil $110 this year, $125 '27 🤑📈, global growth <2% 😱📉 – recession like 4x since '80! UK hardest hit 🍵🇬🇧, growth SLASHED to 0.8% 📉😭 then 1.3% rebound 🐸⬆️. Iran economy SHRINKS 6.1% 🍆📉, Qatar LNG king 🏰⛽ bombed to -8.6% 😩💥 (Ras Laffan refinery OWCH 🔥🏭), Iraq -6.8% but 11.3% bounce 🐥📈. Saudi MBS pipeline HACK 🛢️➡️ Red Sea 🏜️🔥 keeps 'em at 3.1% glow-up 📈👑, Russia PUTIN WINNER 🐻🤑 growing 1.1% on oil HIGH 💰🚀 after Trump lifted sanctions like 'EXPORT THAT CRUDÉ DADDY 🍆🛢️!' Trump 🍊👨‍💼 BLOCKADES Iran ports 🚢🔒, temporarily freed 140M barrels Iranian oil for 30 days ⏳🤑 – EU finance bro Valdis Dombrovskis MAD AF 🤬: 'Russia's WAR MACHINE FED by high prices 😡🛢️ – NO EASY MODE!' China growth trimmed to 4.4% 📉🐉 but steady. Bessent & Trump duo SLAYING long-game security 🛡️🌍 while IMF doomsayers CRY recession 🥺📉 – 'Small pain for BIG WINS 💪🤑, Iran CLOWNS OWNED!' 😂🇺🇸🔥
